# Data Dictionary — Mutual Fund Analytics Platform

**Schema:** `dbo` (PostgreSQL 18, local: `mf_analytics`)
**Last updated:** Day 7 (Week 1 complete)
**Total tables:** 9 (5 dimension, 4 fact)
**Total rows:** ~110,914 across all tables

---

## Dimension Tables

### `dbo.Dim_Date`
**Grain:** One row per calendar day.
**Rows:** 4,383 (2015-01-01 → 2026-12-31)
**Source:** Generated by `scripts/etl/load_dimensions.py` (vectorised pandas)
**Purpose:** Date spine for all time-series joins. Indian financial year columns enable SEBI-aligned reporting in Power BI.

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `date_key` | `INTEGER` | PK | YYYYMMDD integer — faster to join than DATE | `20260529` |
| `full_date` | `DATE` | UNIQUE | Native date for display and date arithmetic | `2026-05-29` |
| `day_of_week` | `SMALLINT` | | ISO: 1=Monday … 7=Sunday | `4` |
| `day_name` | `VARCHAR(10)` | | | `'Thursday'` |
| `day_of_month` | `SMALLINT` | | 1–31 | `29` |
| `day_of_year` | `SMALLINT` | | 1–366 | `149` |
| `week_of_year` | `SMALLINT` | | ISO week number | `22` |
| `month_num` | `SMALLINT` | | 1–12 | `5` |
| `month_name` | `VARCHAR(10)` | | | `'May'` |
| `quarter` | `SMALLINT` | | Calendar quarter 1–4 | `2` |
| `year` | `SMALLINT` | | | `2026` |
| `is_weekday` | `BOOLEAN` | | FALSE for Saturday/Sunday | `true` |
| `is_month_end` | `BOOLEAN` | | Last calendar day of month | `false` |
| `is_quarter_end` | `BOOLEAN` | | Last day of Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec | `false` |
| `is_year_end` | `BOOLEAN` | | December 31 | `false` |
| `financial_year` | `VARCHAR(10)` | | Indian FY (Apr–Mar) | `'FY2025-26'` |
| `financial_quarter` | `VARCHAR(8)` | | Q1=Apr-Jun within Indian FY | `'Q1FY26'` |

**Index:** `idx_dim_date_year_month` on `(year, month_num)` — monthly aggregations.

---

### `dbo.Dim_AMC`
**Grain:** One row per Asset Management Company.
**Rows:** 51 (all SEBI-registered Indian AMCs)
**Source:** AMFI daily NAV file, extracted by `scripts/etl/load_dimensions.py`

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `amc_key` | `SERIAL` | PK | Surrogate key | `1` |
| `amc_name` | `VARCHAR(200)` | UNIQUE | Full registered name | `'HDFC Mutual Fund'` |
| `amc_short_name` | `VARCHAR(50)` | | Derived by stripping 'Mutual Fund' suffix | `'HDFC'` |

---

### `dbo.Dim_Category`
**Grain:** One row per SEBI fund category.
**Rows:** 50 (42 parsed via primary regex + 8 via secondary)
**Source:** AMFI scheme_type strings, parsed by `scripts/etl/load_dimensions.py`

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `category_key` | `SERIAL` | PK | | `5` |
| `raw_category` | `VARCHAR(300)` | UNIQUE | Original AMFI string — preserved for audit | `'Open Ended Schemes(Equity Scheme - Large Cap Fund)'` |
| `structure_type` | `VARCHAR(50)` | | Fund structure | `'Open Ended Schemes'` |
| `asset_class` | `VARCHAR(50)` | | SEBI asset class | `'Equity Scheme'` |
| `sub_category` | `VARCHAR(100)` | | SEBI sub-category | `'Large Cap Fund'` |

**Note:** 8 categories use simplified format `Type(SubCategory)` with no asset_class separator — handled by secondary regex with keyword-based asset_class inference.

---

### `dbo.Dim_Fund`
**Grain:** One row per fund scheme / ticker.
**Rows:** 14,384 (14,368 AMFI schemes + 16 Yahoo ETF/benchmark tickers)
**Source:** `scripts/etl/load_dimensions.py`

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `fund_key` | `SERIAL` | PK | | `1` |
| `scheme_code` | `VARCHAR(20)` | UNIQUE | AMFI scheme code or Yahoo ticker | `'119551'` / `'NIFTYBEES.NS'` |
| `fund_name` | `VARCHAR(400)` | | Full scheme name | `'HDFC Top 100 Fund - Direct Plan - Growth'` |
| `base_fund_name` | `VARCHAR(300)` | | Name stripped of plan/option suffix — for Power BI grouping | `'HDFC Top 100 Fund'` |
| `plan_type` | `VARCHAR(20)` | | `'Direct'`, `'Regular'`, `'Retail'`, `'Institutional'`, NULL for ETFs | `'Direct'` |
| `option_type` | `VARCHAR(30)` | | `'Growth'`, `'IDCW'`, `'Bonus'`, NULL for ETFs | `'Growth'` |
| `amc_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_AMC | NULL for Yahoo benchmarks | `3` |
| `category_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Category | NULL for Yahoo tickers | `12` |
| `isin_growth` | `VARCHAR(12)` | | ISIN for growth/reinvestment option | `'INF179KB1BE2'` |
| `isin_idcw` | `VARCHAR(12)` | | ISIN for dividend/payout option | `'INF179KB1BD4'` |
| `source` | `VARCHAR(20)` | | `'amfi'`, `'yahoo_etf'`, `'yahoo_benchmark'` | `'amfi'` |
| `is_benchmark` | `BOOLEAN` | | TRUE for ^NSEI, ^BSESN, ^NSEBANK, ^CNXIT, ^CRSLDX | `false` |
| `is_active` | `BOOLEAN` | | | `true` |
| `inception_date` | `DATE` | | First NAV date — NULL until historical AMFI data loaded | `NULL` |

**Indexes:** `idx_dim_fund_amc`, `idx_dim_fund_category`, `idx_dim_fund_source_benchmark`

---

### `dbo.Dim_Investor`
**Grain:** One row per investor.
**Rows:** 500 (synthetic, seed=42, matches `scripts/transformation/clean_transactions.py`)
**Source:** `scripts/etl/load_dimensions.py`

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `investor_key` | `SERIAL` | PK | | `1` |
| `investor_id` | `VARCHAR(20)` | UNIQUE | `INV00000` … `INV00499` | `'INV00042'` |
| `age_group` | `VARCHAR(10)` | | `'18-25'`, `'26-35'`, `'36-45'`, `'46-55'`, `'55+'` | `'26-35'` |
| `city` | `VARCHAR(50)` | | 15 major Indian cities | `'Mumbai'` |
| `state` | `VARCHAR(50)` | | Derived from city | `'Maharashtra'` |
| `risk_profile` | `VARCHAR(20)` | | `'Conservative'` (35%), `'Moderate'` (45%), `'Aggressive'` (20%) | `'Moderate'` |
| `investor_segment` | `VARCHAR(20)` | | `'Retail'` (80%), `'HNI'` (18%), `'Institutional'` (2%) | `'Retail'` |
| `kyc_status` | `BOOLEAN` | | 95% TRUE (realistic Indian MF universe) | `true` |

**Note:** All investor attributes are synthetic. Replace via `clean_transactions.py --input <real_data>` when real KYC data is available.

---

## Fact Tables

### `dbo.Fact_NAV`
**Grain:** One row per fund × trading date.
**Rows:** 32,607
**Source:** `scripts/etl/load_facts.py`
**Dropped rows:** 409 (29 pre-2015 dates outside Dim_Date spine + 380 zero-NAV newly-registered AMFI schemes)

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `nav_key` | `BIGSERIAL` | PK | | |
| `date_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Date | | `20260528` |
| `fund_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Fund | | `14369` |
| `nav` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | Closing NAV or adjusted close price — always > 0 | `297.5540` |
| `open_price` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | NULL for AMFI records | `295.10` |
| `high_price` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | NULL for AMFI records | `298.20` |
| `low_price` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | NULL for AMFI records | `294.80` |
| `volume` | `BIGINT` | | NULL for AMFI records | `1234567` |
| `source` | `VARCHAR(20)` | | `'amfi'`, `'yahoo_etf'`, `'yahoo_benchmark'` | `'yahoo_etf'` |
| `is_outlier` | `BOOLEAN` | | TRUE if |z-score| > 5.0 within fund's time series (flagged by clean_nav.py) | `false` |
| `loaded_at` | `TIMESTAMPTZ` | | ETL load timestamp | |

**Constraint:** `CHECK (nav > 0)` — zero-NAV rows are filtered at ETL boundary.
**Unique:** `(fund_key, date_key)` — prevents duplicate daily entries.
**Indexes:** `uq_fact_nav_fund_date` (unique), `idx_fact_nav_date_key`

---

### `dbo.Fact_Transactions`
**Grain:** One row per investor transaction.
**Rows:** 35,280 (synthetic)
**Source:** `scripts/etl/load_facts.py` ← `data/processed/transactions_clean_*.parquet`

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `transaction_key` | `BIGSERIAL` | PK | | |
| `date_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Date | | `20250601` |
| `fund_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Fund | | `3412` |
| `investor_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Investor | | `42` |
| `transaction_type` | `VARCHAR(15)` | | `'SIP'`, `'Lumpsum'`, `'Redemption'` | `'SIP'` |
| `amount` | `NUMERIC(18,2)` | | Always > 0 | `5000.00` |
| `units` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | Units purchased or redeemed | `16.8350` |
| `nav_at_transaction` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | NAV at time of transaction | `297.08` |
| `transaction_hash` | `CHAR(64)` | UNIQUE | SHA-256 of `investor_id|scheme_code|date|amount|type` — prevents duplicate loads | `'a3f8...'` |
| `loaded_at` | `TIMESTAMPTZ` | | | |

**Breakdown:** SIP 28,224 txns (INR 8.7Cr) · Lumpsum 5,298 txns (INR 20.3Cr) · Redemption 1,758 txns (INR 0.67Cr)
**Dedup:** `ON CONFLICT (transaction_hash) DO NOTHING` — transactions are immutable.

---

### `dbo.Fact_SIP`
**Grain:** One row per investor × fund × month (month-start date).
**Rows:** 28,224
**Source:** Derived in-memory from Fact_Transactions data by `scripts/etl/load_facts.py` — no DB round-trip.

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `sip_key` | `BIGSERIAL` | PK | | |
| `date_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Date | Month-start date key | `20250601` |
| `fund_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Fund | | |
| `investor_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Investor | | |
| `monthly_sip_amount` | `NUMERIC(18,2)` | | Sum of SIP inflows this month | `5000.00` |
| `cumulative_invested` | `NUMERIC(18,2)` | | Running total invested to this month | `60000.00` |
| `units_purchased` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | Units bought this month | `16.8350` |
| `current_units_held` | `NUMERIC(18,4)` | | Cumulative net units after redemptions | `183.42` |
| `loaded_at` | `TIMESTAMPTZ` | | | |

**Unique:** `(investor_key, fund_key, date_key)` — one row per investor-fund-month.
**Drives:** Streamlit SIP Planner, `sp_compute_aum()`.

---

### `dbo.Fact_Returns`
**Grain:** One row per fund × as-of date.
**Rows:** 16 (one per Yahoo ETF/benchmark fund — AMFI schemes have single-point NAV, no time series)
**Source:** Four separate scripts, each updating only its own columns (column-targeted UPSERT pattern):

| Script | Columns written |
|---|---|
| `metrics_returns.py` | `return_1y/3y/5y`, `cagr_1y/3y/5y` |
| `metrics_risk.py` | `std_dev_1y`, `max_drawdown` |
| `metrics_market.py` | `beta`, `alpha` |
| `metrics_risk_adjusted.py` | `sharpe_ratio`, `sortino_ratio`, `treynor_ratio` |

| Column | Type | PK/FK | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `return_key` | `BIGSERIAL` | PK | | |
| `date_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Date | As-of date (fund's latest NAV date) | `20260528` |
| `fund_key` | `INTEGER` | FK → Dim_Fund | | |
| `return_1y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Absolute 1Y total return (%) | `-2.43` |
| `return_3y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Absolute 3Y total return (%) | `33.57` |
| `return_5y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Absolute 5Y total return (%) | `62.44` |
| `cagr_1y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | 1Y CAGR (%) | `-2.43` |
| `cagr_3y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | 3Y CAGR (%) | `10.13` |
| `cagr_5y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | 5Y CAGR (%) | `10.19` |
| `std_dev_1y` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Annualised daily vol, trailing 1Y (%) | `12.09` |
| `max_drawdown` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Max peak-to-trough decline since inception (%, negative) | `-16.11` |
| `sharpe_ratio` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | `(CAGR_1Y - Rf) / σ × √252`, Rf=6.5% | `-0.6845` |
| `sortino_ratio` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Sharpe variant using downside deviation only | `-0.6673` |
| `treynor_ratio` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | `(CAGR_1Y - Rf) / Beta` | `-9.99` |
| `alpha` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | Jensen's Alpha vs Nifty 50 (%) | `1.51` |
| `beta` | `NUMERIC(10,4)` | | OLS slope vs ^NSEI daily returns | `0.8938` |
| `loaded_at` | `TIMESTAMPTZ` | | | |

**NULL rules:**
- `cagr_5y`/`return_5y` NULL for funds with < 1,000 trading days (HDFCNIFTY.NS, MONIFTY500.NS)
- `cagr_3y`/`return_3y` NULL for < 550 trading days
- All metrics NULL for AMFI schemes (single-day snapshot, no time series)

---

## SQL Views

| View | Rows | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `dbo.vw_fund_performance` | 16 | All 13 metrics with AMC + category joins. Power BI Fund Performance page. |
| `dbo.vw_investor_segmentation` | 500 | Per-investor transaction aggregates. Power BI Investor Analytics + Streamlit Risk Profiler. |
| `dbo.vw_risk_summary` | 16 | Risk metrics with SEBI riskometer tier. Power BI Risk & Volatility page. |

## Stored Functions

| Function | Signature | Returns |
|---|---|---|
| `dbo.sp_compute_aum()` | `(p_as_of_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE)` | `TABLE (scheme_code, fund_name, amc_name, total_units, nav_price, aum_inr)` |
| `dbo.sp_top_funds_by_category()` | `(p_category VARCHAR, p_metric VARCHAR DEFAULT 'cagr_3y', p_top_n INT DEFAULT 10)` | `TABLE (rank_pos, scheme_code, fund_name, sub_category, amc_name, metric_value)` |

---

## Known Limitations (Week 1)

| Limitation | Impact | Resolution |
|---|---|---|
| AMFI data = single daily snapshot | No time-series metrics for 14,368 AMFI schemes | Run `fetch_amfi_nav.py --historical` to load 5Y historical data |
| 5 Yahoo ETF tickers delisted | 5 fewer ETFs in Fact_NAV | Update `FUND_TICKERS` dict in `fetch_yahoo_finance.py` with current tickers |
| Synthetic investor data | Fact_Transactions/SIP are demo-only | Replace via `clean_transactions.py --input <real_data>` |
| MON100.NS max_drawdown = -90% | Artifactual — Yahoo Finance unadjusted price discontinuity | Filter using `is_outlier = true` in downstream analytics |
| `inception_date` NULL for all funds | Can't filter by fund age | Populate after loading historical AMFI data |
